title: ForEachBatch for Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines is available (Public Preview)
body:
You can now process streams in Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines as a series of micro-batches in Python, using a ForEachBatch sink. The ForEachBatch sink is available in public preview.

See [Use ForEachBatch to write to arbitrary data sinks in pipelines](/aws/en/ldp/for-each-batch).

ref_links.text: Use ForEachBatch to write to arbitrary data sinks in pipelines
